description: Forgejo Actions runner lane policy for EdgeVector local forge. Merge-blocking ci-required stays on the docker/pc + macos-arm64 merge gate; long release/deploy jobs use the dedicated heavy host lane.

merge_gate.purpose: Pre-merge ci-required only. Keep capacity free for fold/lastgit PR gates.
merge_gate.notes: Mac merge runner is host-only macos-arm64 after 2026-07-13; PC owns docker/* merge jobs. Do not attach long release/deploy workflows to these labels.

heavy.purpose: Long-running release and deploy jobs (fold tags, exemem-infra deploys). Never a required pre-merge status.

workflow_routing.example: release.yml / deploy jobs: runs-on: heavy (or macos). Leave ci-required needs: limited to merge-gate jobs only.

heavy.notes: Host-mode runners (label:host). Capacity 1 each so a release does not stack with another long job on the same machine. Repo-scoped registration keeps fold release capacity separate from exemem deploys.

proof.expected: heavy_ok=true, merge_gate_has_heavy=false, at least one heavy local home with label heavy and capacity>=1
